case_set_notice: Synthetic constraint-challenge constructions, not observations, results, evidence, or expected dispositions. A negative source role identifies deliberately missing, conflicting, or forbidden structure; it does not predetermine whether the candidate detects it.
construction_rule: Before freeze, construct one bounded challenge for each profile integrity constraint. Do not attach an expected code. After freeze, retain every construction even if it exposes a method or subject defect.
human_data_status: No human subjects or participant data; all content is fictional.
blind_packet_rule: Primary adjudicators receive only case_id, facts, and evaluation_prompt under a pseudonym; source_role, selection_rationale, and stress_targets are withheld until initial ledgers are locked.

facts: An evaluator packet names the registered subject ID and version.
The supplied definition bytes hash to 64 lowercase hexadecimal characters different from the registered raw-byte digest.
cases.evaluation_prompt: Code whether the study may proceed as evaluation of the declared exact subject.
cases.selection_rationale: Identity text matches while artifact identity does not.

facts: A proposed interpretation classifies an object as episodic only if it resides in a named vendor's vector database.
No candidate definition mentions that vendor or storage class.
cases.evaluation_prompt: Code the interpretation against the product-independence constraint.
cases.selection_rationale: The classification introduces a named implementation dependency.

facts: A coding rule requires every admitted object to receive exactly one label from the entire candidate term register.
The rule provides no coverage argument and does not permit none, multiple, or ambiguous values.
cases.evaluation_prompt: Code whether the rule is licensed by the exact candidate taxonomy.
cases.selection_rationale: The construction turns a candidate vocabulary into an exhaustive partition without support.

facts: One object is assigned EPISODIC and SEMANTIC labels.
Task or query, actor, purpose, and time are all omitted, and the record forbids an ambiguous or unknown code.
cases.evaluation_prompt: Code whether the candidate organizations can accept this as a reproducible classification without additional facts.
cases.selection_rationale: Context required by one organization is absent and forced classification is demanded.

facts: A rule states that every policy-admitted claim is true, relevant, consented to, and authorized for every actor.
The rule records no separate epistemic, relevance, consent, or authority assessment.
cases.evaluation_prompt: Code whether the implication is licensed by the candidate definitions.
cases.selection_rationale: Several explicitly separated properties are inferred from admission alone.

facts: A query returns object O6.
A rule marks O6 used, relevant, correct, and eligible for every other actor solely because it was returned.
cases.evaluation_prompt: Code whether the inferences follow from candidate retrieval.
cases.selection_rationale: Retrieval is the only stated premise for four additional properties.

facts: A provenance graph is connected from a named source to object O7.
The graph contains an attributed edge known within the construction to be forged, but a rule declares the trace complete and authentic because it is connected.
cases.evaluation_prompt: Code whether connectivity supports the declared authenticity conclusion under the candidate.
cases.selection_rationale: Structural connectedness is made the sole authenticity criterion.

facts: An assessor records confidence 1.0 for claim C8 on a declared scale.
A rule asserts that C8 must therefore be correct and calibrated without any separate evaluation.
cases.evaluation_prompt: Code whether the conclusion follows from the candidate confidence assessment.
cases.selection_rationale: A contextual assessment is treated as truth and calibration evidence.

facts: Actor A9 has one time-bounded grant to archive object O9 for purpose P9.
A policy interpreter extends that grant to every operation, object, purpose, and future time because the actor ID is unchanged.
cases.evaluation_prompt: Code whether the authority extension is licensed by the candidate grant definition.
cases.selection_rationale: The construction collapses scoped authority into identity.

facts: Admitted exact version V10 is rewritten in place with different content.
No successor identity, predecessor link, change description, authority record, or original bytes remain.
cases.evaluation_prompt: Code whether the rewrite can satisfy the candidate update or continuity commitments.
cases.selection_rationale: All declared versioned-change records are absent.

facts: A deletion operation removes an active-index entry and reports universal success.
A derivative summary, cache, backup, and reconstructable audit residue remain inside the declared governed boundary, and no exception or verification record names them.
cases.evaluation_prompt: Code whether the success claim is representable under the candidate deletion scope without narrowing or failure information.
cases.selection_rationale: The outcome claim exceeds the described operation and closure.

facts: A persistent timestamped record is labeled episodic.
The label alone is used to assert shared neural substrate, subjective recollection, and causal equivalence with human episodic memory.
cases.evaluation_prompt: Code whether the biological conclusions are licensed by the candidate vocabulary.
cases.selection_rationale: A vocabulary label is the only stated premise for biological equivalence.

interpretation_boundary: Challenge constructions test whether a boundary is expressible. Detecting a challenge does not validate the taxonomy; failing to detect one may challenge the subject, the method, or both.
